"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\smoke_test.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\skwor\gcc\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\smoke_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\smoke_test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\skwor\gcc\bin\c++.exe  -O2 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\smoke_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o smoke_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsmoke_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\smoke_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
